title: Frost Boater
description: Makes frost walker on boots work while boating.
body:
# Frost-Boater Makes the Minecraft Enchantment Frost Walker work with boats. \ \ \ \ **A Forge mod may be made later if the mod does well**

## Server Hosting! Kinetic Hosting is a minecraft serving hosting website with competitive prices. Get 10% off your first month when you use code "declip".
